steps.title: Use the example signal
steps.content: The previous sentence says some researchers think the workers refined their joining process during production. The underlined sentence begins For example and compares an early misaligned join with later nearly invisible joins.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content:
• Choice A concerns the tapestry's depicted people and events, not its joins.
  • Choice C compares different tapestries, but the sentence compares joins in one tapestry.
  • Choice D discusses place of production, which the sentence does not address.

steps.title: Identify the support role
steps.content: The underlined sentence provides evidence that the workers improved their joining technique, supporting the argument about how they produced the tapestry. The answer is B.
